_help_deviceNamePattern: Substring of your Bluetooth headset's name to target, e.g. 'TOZO HT3' or 'WH-1000XM4'. Leave empty ("") to target ALL connected Bluetooth hands-free devices. Copy this file to config.json and edit.
_help_manageFxSound: If you use FxSound (or it's installed), MicDrop re-pins its output to your headset after a toggle/reconnect so audio doesn't drift to the laptop speakers. Set false to leave FxSound alone.
